cards.relevance: 吸入ステロイドはサイトカイン産生をほぼ全て抑制する。

cards.plain: Inhaled corticosteroids (e.g. budesonide, fluticasone) can be added as daily maintenance therapy for persistent asthma
cards.raw: Inhaled {{c1::corticosteroids}} (e.g. budesonide, fluticasone) can be added as daily maintenance therapy for persistent asthma
cards.relevance: ブデソニド・フルチカゾンなど吸入ステロイドは喘息維持療法に用いられる。

cards.plain: What is the effect of corticosteroids on lymphocyte levels?   Decreased (lymphopenia)
cards.raw: What is the effect of corticosteroids on lymphocyte levels?    {{c1::Decreased (lymphopenia)}}
cards.relevance: コルチコステロイドはリンパ球数を減少させる。

cards.plain: What is the effect of corticosteroids on neutrophil levels?   Increased (neutrophilia)
cards.raw: What is the effect of corticosteroids on neutrophil levels?    {{c1::Increased (neutrophilia)}}
cards.relevance: コルチコステロイドは好中球数を増加させる。

cards.plain: Azathioprine/6-MP have a(n) immunosuppressive effect, hence why they are useful in the treatment of graft rejection, SLE, autoimmune hemolytic anemia, etc.
cards.raw: Azathioprine/6-MP have a(n) {{c1::immunosuppressive}} effect, hence why they are useful in the treatment of graft rejection, SLE, autoimmune hemolytic anemia, etc.
cards.relevance: アザチオプリン/6MPは移植拒絶・SLE治療の免疫抑制薬である。

cards.plain: Azathioprine/6MP are used to wean patients off of corticosteroids in the treatment of chronic inflammatory diseases
cards.raw: Azathioprine/6MP are used to wean patients off of {{c1::corticosteroids}} in the treatment of chronic inflammatory diseases
cards.relevance: アザチオプリン/6MPは慢性炎症疾患治療でステロイド離脱に用いられる。

cards.plain: Do inhaled corticosteroids present with the typical adverse effects of corticosteroid therapy?   No, minimal systemic absorption
cards.raw: Do inhaled corticosteroids present with the typical adverse effects of corticosteroid therapy?    {{c1::No, minimal systemic absorption}}
cards.relevance: 吸入ステロイドはシステミック吸収が少なく全身副作用が最小限である。

cards.plain: ADP receptor inhibitors (e.g. clopidogrel) prevent expression of GPIIb/IIIa receptors on the platelet surface

cards.relevance: クロピドグレルなどADP阻害薬は血小板GPIIb/IIIa発現を抑制する。

cards.plain: Colchicine is primarily used for treatment of diseases that involve dysfunction of neutrophils
